footer.address: Yalıncak, Deniz 1 Nolu Sk No:5, 61080 Ortahisar/Trabzon

contact.title: We welcome your feedback
contact.subject: Subject
contact.visitText: With its location close to the sea, stylish atmosphere and delicious menu, La Plage awaits guests for both accommodation and a fine dining experience.

aboutPage.subtitle: OUR STORY
aboutPage.title: Where French Cuisine Meets the Sea
aboutPage.text: Maison La Plage blends artisanal French culinary traditions with a modern coastal atmosphere to offer guests an unforgettable gastronomic experience. Our menu, prepared with seasonal and fresh ingredients, is designed so you can feel the freshness of the sea in every bite.
